Package com.shaft.gui.playwright.internal

package com.shaft.gui.playwright.internal
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    PlaywrightSession
    Owns a single Playwright runtime session for one SHAFT GUI driver instance.
    PlaywrightSessionFactory
    Creates Playwright sessions from SHAFT web and Playwright properties.
    PlaywrightSessionManager
    Thread-local access to the active Playwright session.
    PlaywrightTraceManager
    Starts and attaches Playwright trace artifacts when explicitly enabled.
